title: FULL Committee Hearing: Reforming Defense Acquisition to Deliver Capability at the Speed of Relevance
description: The committee will receive testimony from the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment, accompanied by additional government witnesses, regarding efforts to reform the Department of Defense acquisition system.
text:
The committee will receive testimony from the Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment, accompanied by additional government witnesses, regarding efforts to reform the Department of Defense acquisition system.
Stream Here:
Witnesses:
The Honorable Michael P. Duffey
Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment
Office of the Secretary of Defense
Accompanied By:
Mr. William D. Bailey
Performing the Duties of Assistant Secretary of the Air Force (Acquisition, Technology & Logistics)
Department of the Air Force
Mr. Jason L. Potter
Performing the Duties of Assistant Secretary of the Navy (Research, Development and Acquisition)
Department of the Navy
Major General Stephen Purdy, Jr.
Acting Assistant Secretary of the Air Force (Space Acquisition and Integration)
Department of the Air Force
Mr. Jesse D. Tolleson, Jr.
Acting Assistant Secretary of the Army (Acquisition, Logistics and Technology)
Department of the Army
